text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking down the hallway...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I turn towards the source of the yelling and see a
student sliding down the staircase railing at full
speed.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait! Come back here, you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: We're playing tag, and I'm it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I was chasing her with everything I've got, but I
still somehow lost her!
choice_data_list: Use the railing as a shortcut!
Try to predict where she's going.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The railing? Ah... She rode down the railing just
now, didn't she?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
No wonder she disappeared so fast! What an
amazing idea! Thanks for the help!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket rushes off with a determined look
on her face.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Predict? Predict, huh... Ah! I got it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I bet she's been running at full speed too! Which
means I need to go at even FULLER speed! Woo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket rushes off with a determined look
on her face.
